original_text: Q2 2025 financial performance exceeded analyst expectations, with the company beating EPS estimates by 9.5% (C014). Net income for Q2 2025 reached $642 million, representing 316.88% year-over-year growth, while operating and net margins stood at 19.77% and 20.74% respectively (K002, K003, K004). However, despite the earnings beat, shares dropped approximately 7% following a margin warning for the third and fourth quarters of 2025 (C022). Analyst commentary suggests elevated valuation multiples leave little margin for error amid slowing growth in key markets and broader economic risks (C017).
revised_text: Q2 2025 financial performance exceeded analyst expectations, with the company beating EPS estimates by 9.5% (C085). Net income for Q2 2025 reached $642 million, representing 316.88% year-over-year growth, while operating and net margins stood at 19.77% and 20.74% respectively (K002, K003, K004). However, despite the earnings beat, shares dropped approximately 7% following a margin warning for the third and fourth quarters of 2025 (C093). Analyst commentary suggests elevated valuation multiples leave little margin for error amid slowing growth in key markets and broader economic risks (C088).
changes_summary: Corrected three major citation mismatches identified by the fact-checker: updated EPS beat citation from C014 to C085, share drop/margin warning citation from C022 to C093, and analyst commentary citation from C017 to C088 to align with valid evidence references. All financial figures remain supported by existing calculation IDs.
